heading: Photo wall style
subhead: Customise the live photo wall shown at the event.

upsell.heading: Custom styling is a paid feature
upsell.body: Upgrade this event to {basic} ({basicPrice}) or {gold} ({goldPrice}) to choose a theme, tile layout and add a title overlay. Free events use the appelsin photo collage with a QR code in the corner.

editor.headline: Headline
editor.previewLabel: Preview · live mirror of the photo wall
